description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages unit-test, build, docker-package, analyse, deploy-review, functional-test, tags-production, to-production, and cleanup, using a global before_script that sets PROJECT_VERSION from PROJECT_VERSION.txt and echoes it, and defining variables for backend and frontend container image names. In the build stage add backend_build_image (image bigtruedata/sbt:0.13.15-2.11) with a cache keyed by $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME-ts-tile-backend for sbt directories, artifacting components/ts-tile-backend/target/docker, and running "cd components/ts-tile-backend/ && VERSION=$PROJECT_VERSION sbt docker:stage", and backend_publish_docker_image (image docker:latest, service docker:dind) in the docker-package stage that cd's to the staged Docker files, builds with "docker build -t $BACKEND_CONTAINER_LOCAL_IMAGE .", tags to $BACKEND_CONTAINER_BRANCH_IMAGE, logs in to $CI_REGISTRY, and pushes the image. In the build stage also add frontend_build_dist (image node:8) with a cache and artifacts for dist and node_modules keyed by $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME-ts-frontend, running "cd components/ts-frontend && npm install && ./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng build --prod && rm -r dist/assets/dev-data", and in docker-package add frontend_publish_docker_image (image docker:latest, service docker:dind) that copies the dist to the infra config, builds with "docker build -t $FRONTEND_CONTAINER_LOCAL_IMAGE .", tags to $FRONTEND_CONTAINER_BRANCH_IMAGE, logs in, and pushes; also add frontend_test_unit (image alexmass/node-chrome-headless:8) with the same cache, retry 2, running "cd components/ts-frontend && npm install && ./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng test --single-run=true --browsers ChromeHeadless --watch=false". In the tags-production stage add master_tag_docker_image (image docker:latest, service docker:dind, only on master) that logs in, pulls both backend and frontend branch images, tags each with unique, latest, and $PROJECT_VERSION tags, and pushes all tags; also add sonar (image emeraldsquad/sonar-scanner:1.0.0, only on branches) running "sonar-scanner -Dsonar.login=$SONAR_LOGIN" with node_modules as an artifact, and tile_backend_test_unit (image bigtruedata/sbt:0.13.15-2.11) with a cache keyed by $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME-ts-tile-backend running "cd components/ts-tile-backend/ && sbt clean test", plus test_deployed (image python:3, only on branches except master) that cd's to test/api-system-test, installs requirements, deletes .pyc files, and runs "pytest --cache-clear src" using TS_BACKEND variable pointing to the review backend URL. Finally, in deploy-review add start_review (image registry.gitlab.com/terrasubmersa/terra-submersa-portal/docker-compose:17-dind, only on branches) that sets COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME, DOCKER_ENV_NETWORK, DOCKER_TS_VERSION, logs in, brings down any existing stack, pulls and brings up the compose services, creating a review environment named review/${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME} with a URL, and in cleanup add stop_review (same image, only on branches, manual) that stops and removes the review environment, while in to-production add deploy-to-production (same image, only on master, manual) that sets the same variables and runs "docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml up -d" in components/ts-infra to deploy to production.
